blocks.content: The park at night smelled like grass and popcorn and the particular warmth that came off a Georgia summer after sundown. The movie played.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I don't know. He's in eighth grade. He plays baseball.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I didn't know about him either until last week.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Do you think she actually likes him?
The screen flickered. On it, someone was in love and trying not to say so.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Is it weird that she didn't say anything?

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You don't always have to say things out loud.
He looked at her. She was watching the movie.
